title: The Big Cheese Mouse Killer Box (Twin Pack) - Mouse Poison, Mouse Killer, Poison (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ADVANCED FORMULA: KILLS MICE. WITH 50% LESS POISON
Stations are pre-baited with All-Weather Block Bait - no need to touch the bait
Tamper-resistant bait stations protect children and pets from coming into contact with bait
Two-way entry allows stations to be discreetly positioned in corners around the home
Part of the HOME CHOICE range. Contains difenacoum.
description: From the manufacturer OVER 25 YEARS OF RODENT CONTROL MADE EASY! Bait & Kill: Our Home Choice range offers a bait for every situation, and with 50% LESS POISON than previous formulations, it is the ideal choice for use in and around the home. The range includes damp proof wax blocks suitable for use in all weather conditions, chew thru grain bait sachets for easy bait placement, and highly palatable fresh pasta bait recommended for food preparation areas. Follow our easy on-pack icons to choose the most effective bait for your situation. Catch & Kill: We offer a wide selection of conventional spring traps with a powerful snap and hold. Our Fresh 'n' Tasty range is ready-baited with The Big Cheese Mouse & Rat Attractant - a poison-free formula proven to dramatically increase catch rate. Pet-safe and easy-set options are also available making The Big Cheese Catch & Kill range suitable for use in most areas of the household. Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality cage traps and ready-baited mouse traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Easy-set mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping. Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced ultrasonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Plus a new selection of low-cost consumables designed to help defend homes from rodent infestations. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Pack contains 2 ready-to-use mouse bait stations Rodent bait made easy! Our HOME CHOICE range makes choosing a rodent bait easy. With clear on-pack icons to guide you, and easy-to-follow instructions, you can't go wrong! Stress-free rodent control Experts in rodent control for over 25 years Professional-quality products you can trust All-Weather Block Bait Mouse Killer Stations - 2pk from The Big Cheese Ready-for-use bait for the control of mice in and around buildings. All-Weather Block Bait Mouse Killer stations from The Big Cheese are pre-baited with a fast-acting rodent poison. This advanced formula has been specially designed with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives to create a highly palatable bait that kills rodents in just a few feeds. The twin entry system maximises bait take and allows for discreet placement of the station around the home. Part of the Home Choice range, this product is ideal for use in and around the home. ADVANCED FORMULA: KILLS RATS & MICE. WITH 50% LESS POISON. Stations are pre-baited with All-Weather Block Bait - no need to touch the bait. Tamper-resistant bait stations protect children and pets from coming into contact with bait. Moisture resistant – bait stays fresh and highly palatable in damp and wet weather conditions. Two-way entry allows stations to be discreetly positioned in corners around the home. Clear inspection lid for monitoring bait uptake. Indoor and outdoor use. Part of the HOME CHOICE range. Contains difenacoum. HOME CHOICE: Choose your bait What is Home Choice? Here at The Big Cheese, we understand that tackling a rodent infestation can be daunting. We are here to take the stress out of rodent control. The Big Cheese Home Choice range provides proven and effective control of rats and mice using 50% less poison than previous formulations, making it the ideal choice for use in and around the home. With a bait for every situation, and a lower toxicity formula to give peace of mind to families and pet owners, you can't go wrong with Home Choice. Just follow our colour-coded icons to find the suitable bait for your situation. damp proof Our professional-grade wax blocks are moisture-resistant, staying fresh and highly palatable even in damp and wet weather conditions. Made with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives, everything down to the shape of the block has been specially designed to achieve maximum effectiveness. Their universal design means they are compatible with all bait stations. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use. food prep Our fresh pasta bait is highly palatable, making it ideal for use in kitchens and food preparation areas where there are competing food sources that may otherwise result in reduced bait consumption. The bait stays clumped together even when nibbled, creating less mess and preventing cross-contamination. Our pasta bait is supplied in ready-to-use sachets - just place directly into your bait station. chew thru Our grain bait is supplied in highly attractive chew thru sachets - there is no need to touch the bait. The pre-measured sachets are ready to place directly into a bait station, and are available in a range of different pack sizes for both mice and rats. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, this fast-acting bait is a great alternative to our wax blocks if you are nervous about handling the bait.
